name: delcam/highlighted-boxes
title: DelCam: Highlighted Boxes
description: Section with a heading and a card grid. Cards managed directly in the block.

default.headline: Operator-Led
default.content: Our partners have run manufacturing businesses — not just invested in them. We understand the shop floor, the customer relationships, and the operational levers that matter.

default.headline: No Re-Trades
default.content: Our LOI is our word. We price deals fairly upfront, conduct focused diligence, and close on the terms we agreed to. Every time.

default.headline: Patient Capital
default.content: We hold companies for the long term. Our investment horizon is aligned with building durable value — not engineering a quick exit.

default.headline: Founder-Friendly
default.content: We respect what you've built. Rollover equity, management retention, and legacy preservation are core to how we structure every transaction.

default.headline: Hands-On Support
default.content: Post-close, our operating team is a resource, not a burden. We support where needed and step back where management thrives.

default.headline: Sector Expertise
default.content: Decades of experience in precision manufacturing give us an edge in diligence, integration, and identifying opportunities others miss.
